description_long: This rifle features a bullpup configuration with a compact, angular body and a matte black finish. The upper section houses a large, boxy optical sight, while the lower receiver integrates a pistol grip and a detachable box magazine. The barrel is relatively short and robust, protruding slightly from the front, and is paired with a squared-off handguard. The magazine is translucent, allowing for visual round count, and the overall design emphasizes tactical utility with minimal external ornamentation. The rifle's surfaces are predominantly hard and metallic, with some polymer components visible on the grip and magazine. Its design suggests a modern, urban combat application, prioritizing maneuverability and modularity.
description: A compact, matte black bullpup rifle with a large optical sight, short barrel, and detachable translucent magazine, designed for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the large optical sight, pistol grip, magazine, and short barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel muzzle and the width of the sight housing.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features with clear visibility of the magazine and sight.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the sight and the stock area, with the barrel end visible.
